title: A Productive Morning at Work
content: Mina arrives at the office at 8:30. She checks her schedule, reads new emails, and prepares a short report. Before lunch, she attends a meeting with her team. They make a decision about a client request and set a deadline for Friday.

title: Changing a Travel Plan
content: Leo has a flight reservation for Monday, but his meeting was delayed. He calls the airline to confirm a new departure time. After that, he updates his itinerary and books accommodation near the conference center.

title: Keeping a Monthly Budget
content: A small company reviews its monthly budget every Friday. The finance team compares expenses with revenue and prepares a report for the manager. Their goal is to reduce unnecessary costs and increase profit next quarter.
